org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.creation

Class EdgeCreationMode<G extends Graph<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,?,A,E>,E extends Edge<G,?,A,E>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.actionmode.ActionMode<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.creation.EdgeCreationMode<G,A,E>
  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graph supported by the mode container.
    A - is the type of the anchors supported by the mode container.
    E - is the type of the edges supported by the mode container.
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FSMTransitionCreationMode

    public abstract class EdgeCreationMode<G extends Graph<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,?,A,E>,E extends Edge<G,?,A,E>>
extends ActionMode<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create edges between anchors.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:09
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND, Mahdi HANNOUN
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-swingpanel

      • EdgeCreationMode

        Construct a new EdgeCreationMode with the given parent.
        Parameters:
        modeManager - a reference to the ModeManager that contains this Mode.

      • createEdge

        protected abstract E createEdge()
        Invoked to create an edge instance that is not already connected to anchors.
        Returns:
        the edge instance.

      • addEdge

        protected void addEdge(E edge,
           A startAnchor,
           A endAnchor,
           List<Point2D> controlPoints)
        Invoked to connect the specified edge to the specified anchors and with the specified path.
        Parameters:
        edge - is the new edge
        startAnchor - is the start anchor.
        endAnchor - is the end anchor.
        controlPoints - are the edge control point, including the points that may be connected to the anchors.
